title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Safexpress

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Safexpress
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Safexpress. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Safexpress:
Safexpress is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Safexpress!
